title: Delhi Heat Wave
lead: Delhi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.57. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Delhi are extremely hot and dry, with a relative humidity of 20% and a wind speed of 10.2 km/h. 
 The heat wave has resulted in a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD), with a value of 18.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no relief in sight, and the city's residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay safe.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
